nodes.title: Implement queue depth limit for upstream connections
nodes.description:
When an upstream MCP becomes unresponsive, requests queue up consuming goroutines and memory. We need a configurable `max_pending_requests` setting per server that rejects new requests immediately when the limit is reached rather than queuing indefinitely.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Config: `max_pending_requests: N` in server YAML
- When limit reached, return structured error immediately
- Semaphore slot released on timeout/cancellation
- Status command shows current pending count

nodes.title: Add minimcp bench CLI command
nodes.description:
Add a `minimcp bench` subcommand that shows token reduction statistics for each configured server by running fixture-based benchmarks.

Output should show: server, tool, raw tokens, projected tokens, stripped tokens, reduction %

nodes.title: Init wizard: import from Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini configs
nodes.description:
Extend `minimcp init` to detect and import MCP configs from:
- `~/.cursor/mcp.json`
- `~/.codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json`
- `~/.gemini/settings.json`
- `~/.codex/config.json`
